## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 8, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _月野_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "Instead of constantly finding new ways to make users spend more money, could you actually focus on improving the app? Almost every update is about subscriptions, paid features, or encouraging users to top up. I can't remember the last time an update genuinely addressed what users have been asking for. The writing quality and dialogue generation still have many issues, yet those rarely seem to be a priority. It feels like user feedback is being ignored while monetization keeps getting pushed."
            2. _Bes Mohammad_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "I’ve used Doki Chat for over a year and used to love its good memory, immersive conversations, and how bots stayed in character. Features like inner thoughts and diaries were unique, but after recent updates the quality dropped badly. Replies get cut off, responses are very slow, hearts get wasted, and both inner thoughts and diaries are strangely written from my POV instead of the bot’s. I really hope the app returns to its old quality and the team communicates more with users."
            3. _Irislene Oliveira Silva_, Jun 19, 2026, 1/5: "There are a lot of bugs. The app has good stories and a beautiful interface, but it crashes frequently and sometimes stops responding, making reading difficult. It has potential, but needs more stability and optimization to offer a better experience."
